action.reasoning: Observation: Iter9 failed with RuntimeError in UNet forward due to size mismatch (skip connection dimensions 30 vs 15). The UNet architecture defined had incorrect handling of skip connections after downsampling/upsampling layers. Analysis: The downsampling with maxpool reduces spatial size 60→30→15, but the skip connections likely stored from wrong layers. Need to fix UNet to properly store skips after each downsampling block and concatenate in reverse order during decoding, ensuring channel sizes match. Decision: Rewrite UNet with correct channel progression and skip concatenation, incorporate scalar conditioning as extra channels broadcast to all levels. Then train for 3 epochs (≈20 min) and submit eval to test architecture within remaining time.
